metaDescription: Open stories about breakthroughs, failures and real-world learning.
title: Stories
description: Open stories about breakthroughs, failures and real-world learning.
heading: Open stories about what helped, what failed, and what changed afterward.
commons: This page is now a real story commons. People can publish success and failure stories, update them for 30 days after publishing, and add later follow-up comments as the situation evolves.

story1.title: Two eco-faces meet on the map
story1.summary: Anna and Ben found each other through the platform and now tend a shared permaculture garden.
story1.author: Anna Kovacs

story2.title: Growth of the Green Island community
story2.summary: Five new members joined our community within a month thanks to the Changemappers newsletter.
story2.author: Peter Nagy

shareDescription: Publish a grounded account of what helped, what failed and what changed.

beforePublish.title: Before you publish
beforePublish.noDeletion: Stories cannot be deleted later. If you delete your account, authorship becomes anonymized, but the story stays in the commons. All submitted stories are licensed under
beforePublish.useDetail: Use concrete detail. Name the context, the challenge, what actually happened, and what you learned. Failure stories are explicitly welcome.

form.signInPrompt: Sign in to publish a story or add follow-up comments to your own stories.
form.browseWithoutLogin: You can browse all stories without signing in.
form.successHint: A breakthrough, win, or approach that helped.
form.failureHint: A miss, setback, or attempt that did not work.

fields.title: Title
fields.summaryHint: One concise paragraph people can scan quickly.
fields.contextHint: What setting, team, or project was this in?
fields.challengeHint: What problem, tension, or risk were you facing?
fields.whatHappenedHint: Describe the sequence, not the polished version.
fields.outcomeHint: What changed, improved, failed, or stayed unresolved?
fields.lessonsLearnedHint: What should others understand before trying something similar?

retrospective.title: Mini retrospective (optional)
retrospective.hint: Keep this lightweight. These fields are optional but useful.
retrospective.whatToChange: What would you change next time

acknowledgements.noDeletion: I understand this story cannot be deleted later and will only become anonymized if I delete my platform account.
acknowledgements.license: I agree to publish this story under the CC-BY-SA 4.0 license.

published.title: Published stories
published.empty: No stories yet. The first one can be a success or a failure. Both are useful.
published.editingClosed: Editing closed on {{date}} because stories are only editable for 30 days after publishing.

comments.title: Submitter comments
comments.placeholder: What changed after publishing? What would you add now?

errors.commentTooShort: Comment must be at least 3 characters.
errors.commentFailed: Could not add comment right now.
